title: X-tra Molten Norwegian Halal-Friendly Fish Fry
description: Indulge in this unique fusion dish featuring succulent halal-friendly fish, crispy Norwegian-style fry, and a spicy kick from homemade pico de gallo sauce.
instructions: Prepare a large plate for breading the cod fillets.
In a shallow dish, mix together the halal-friendly breadcrumb mix and Norwegian-style seasonings.
In another shallow dish, beat the egg.
Dip each cod fillet in the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Then, coat the egg-coated cod fillet in the breadcrumb mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the breaded cod fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the cod fillets with a little vegetable oil and sprinkle with salt and black pepper.
Bake the cod fillets in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the pico de gallo sauce by combining diced tomatoes, onion, jalapeños, cilantro, and lime juice in a bowl.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat and add a small amount of vegetable oil.
Add the crispy Norwegian-style fry to the skillet and cook until golden brown and crispy.
Serve the X-tra Molten Norwegian Halal-Friendly Fish Fry hot, topped with pico de gallo sauce, crispy Norwegian-style fry, and a sprinkle of parsley.
